The assassin strikes again, and Ruixiang displays impressive combat skills, leaving Yinchen curious about his true intentions of seeking protection from her...

programme.title: SHERO - EP 8
programme.desc: Code discovers a confidential folder named RC in Yinxi's laptop Yinchen suspects it is related to the mysterious man R. Xinya recalls that Ruixiang has met Yinxi in Australia. Code unlocks the RC folder and uncovers criminal evidence of Guowei Medical Group. Ah-biao kills Dai Guowei, but sets up his death as a suicide. Using a test email, Yinchen confirms that Ruixiang is indeed R...

programme.title: The Blood of Youth - EP 11
programme.desc: Aspiring young hero Lei Wu Jie was on his way to the great Xue Yue City when he mistakenly strayed into the Fallen Snow Villa. His first heroic deed does not go as planned since he ended up owing the owner Xiao Se a debt for the damages to his place. Left with no choice, Lei Wu Jie takes Xiao Se along. On their journey, they meet Tang Lian who is a disciple of the Tang sect. Together, the group of youths embark on an adventure.

programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Seeing that Shen Zhihui's family is well-off, Zhao Nanxiu decides to abandon Jin Sulin and pursue Zhihui. Unaware of this, Sulin remains busy searching for a new home and preparing to marry Nanxiu.

programme.title: Have A Nice Dream 2025 - EP 13
programme.desc: As heat waves hit Taiwan, this episode seeks cool summer escapes in the mountains of Taoyuan and New Taipei, including the famous Dabao River, to show how visitors can enjoy nature safely. Viewers will be surprised to find hidden gems so close to Taipei - a blacksmith’s shop deep in the hills, an old grocery along an ancient trail, and stunning views revealing the mystery of Cihu Lake. A refreshing journey into northern Taiwan’s secret valleys.

programme.title: The Witch’s Diner - EP 4
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Chen Shanmei comes to the Witch's Diner with the wish to get her boyfriend back. The price to pay is her nightingale-like voice.

programme.title: News Tonight - EP 77
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.desc: While reviewing forgotten case files, Mu Zhuohua uncovers a connection that ties together several seemingly unrelated incidents. Her discovery forces Liu Yan to accelerate his plans, knowing that the people behind the conspiracy are now aware of how close they are to the truth.

programme.title: Genius Go Go Go - EP 283

programme.title: The Ringmaster - EP 5

programme.title: Den Bagus, Pinjam Cintanya Dong Seratus
programme.desc: It tells the story of a handsome young man named Bagus. It is said that Bagus was late in delivering flowers to Irene and her beautiful friends. But strangely, Bagus was not angry. This is because all the girls liked Bagus. Meanwhile, Bagus said to Irene, "The flower you like most is a rose. But don't touch it wrong, because if you do, your hand will be hurt!" Then when Irene wanted to borrow Bagus's love a hundred times, Bagus welcomed her with a big smile.

programme.title: STAND UP COMEDY ACADEMY 4 - EP 24
programme.desc: Stand Up Comedy Academy (Season 4) is the fourth installment of the popular comedian talent search competition aired on Indosiar. programme.title: Pesona Tompelmu Mengalihkan Duniaku

programme.title: Mohon Doa Restu Yura, Semesta Mendukung
programme.desc: Syifa (Rayna Snova) is fiercely determined to get into her dream university, but her friends relentlessly mock her, claiming she lacks the brains. In the middle of the humiliation, a handsome guy named Bowo (Aditya Zoni) steps in to defend her. Bowo offers to tutor Syifa until she passes the entrance exams, but it comes with a catch: once accepted, Syifa must agree to be his fake girlfriend for three months.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 223
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Ditiup Kamu Bikin Cenat Cenut
programme.desc: Bastian (Cakrawala Airawan) is a pampered, sheltered rich boy whose world turns upside down when his family's business suddenly goes bankrupt. Desperate for a job, he accidentally bumps into Maesaroh (Shanice Margaretha), a proud Betawi girl carrying food containers. After a clumsy rescue leads to an accidental embrace, Maesaroh invites the jobless Bastian to join her traditional Tanjidor musical troupe—a legacy left by her late father. As they grow closer, they remain blissfully unaware of anot

programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. However, just as Suryani prepares to confess her love, she discovers a heartbreaking truth: her best friend is also secretly in love with Richard

programme.title: Ngarep Ditaksir Eh Malah Di Unfol
programme.desc: Fresh off a painful breakup, Rama (El Ryan) and Sita (Andi Viola) accidentally collide in the street. Sita, who was carrying a batch of carefully baked cupcakes meant to win back her ex, watches in horror as her hard work splatters across the pavement. A guilt-ridden Rama offers to compensate her tenfold, but Sita takes it as an insult. For her, it was never about the money—those cupcakes were her final, desperate hope to salvage her relationship.

programme.desc: Sadam (Ridho Ilahi) is a dedicated police officer who regularly conducts roadside checkpoints. programme.title: Mohon Doa Restu Yura, Semesta Mendukung
programme.desc: Syifa (Rayna Snova) is fiercely determined to get into her dream university, but her friends relentlessly mock her, claiming she lacks the brains. In the middle of the humiliation, a handsome guy named Bowo (Aditya Zoni) steps in to defend her. Bowo offers to tutor Syifa until she passes the entrance exams, but it comes with a catch: once accepted, Syifa must agree to be his fake girlfriend for three months.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 224
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Ditiup Kamu Bikin Cenat Cenut
programme.desc: Bastian (Cakrawala Airawan) is a pampered, sheltered rich boy whose world turns upside down when his family's business suddenly goes bankrupt. Desperate for a job, he accidentally bumps into Maesaroh (Shanice Margaretha), a proud Betawi girl carrying food containers. After a clumsy rescue leads to an accidental embrace, Maesaroh invites the jobless Bastian to join her traditional Tanjidor musical troupe—a legacy left by her late father. As they grow closer, they remain blissfully unaware of anot

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 26
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: Cinta Terhalang Palang Pintu Gue Beri
programme.desc: Suryani (Andi Viola) is a proud member of a traditional Betawi cultural arts troupe. Her best friend always encourages her to find a strong, protective man who can keep her safe. Hope arrives when a charming new member named Richard (Fendy Chow) joins the studio, instantly stealing Suryani's heart. However, just as Suryani prepares to confess her love, she discovers a heartbreaking truth: her best friend is also secretly in love with Richard

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 173
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: PANGGILAN TAK TERJAWAB
programme.desc: Samsul (Alfi Alfandy) finds his life suddenly spiraling out of control as a barrage of worldly crises and tragedies hit him all at once. Drowned in stress and desperate for solutions, he begins to neglect his daily prayers and spiritual duties. This religious drama serves as a profound reflection on how far a person can survive life's harshest trials when they choose to distance themselves from God

programme.title: TAJWID CINTA - EP 1
programme.desc: Dafri returns to Indonesia with a joyful heart, ready to get engaged to his girlfriend, Alina. However, his life takes a drastic detour when a girl named Syifa is left stranded at the altar after her own fiancé, Ilham, mysteriously vanishes. Out of an immense debt of gratitude owed to Syifa's family, Dafri's father forces Dafri into an arranged marriage with Syifa instead. Bound to a stranger, the two must navigate a stormy marriage filled with resentment and endless conflicts.

programme.title: Tanpa Kamu Warga Indonesia Kurang Satu
programme.desc: Bian (Kevin Hillers) is thrilled to cross paths with his old friend, Qiara (Larasati Nugroho), only for his heart to shatter when he realizes she cannot see him; Qiara completely lost her sight in a tragic accident. Deeply moved, Bian stays by her side to support her, and the two form an unbreakable bond—even though Qiara already has a boyfriend waiting in the wings.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 27
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. programme.title: TOK TOK TOK PAKET JODOH ASYIAPPP
programme.desc: To keep her family financially afloat, Dania secretly participates in dangerous, illegal street races. When her mother uncovers the truth, she fiercely opposes it, terrified that Dania will suffer the same fate as her older brother, who was left paralyzed from a racing accident. Caught between survival and her mother's tears, Dania must find a safer way to make a living

programme.title: Cik Misi 123 - EP 25

programme.title: Siapa Takut Orang Ketiga - EP 24

Driven by conflicting motives, the three find themselves locked in escalating tension and a brewing family feud.

programme.title: Incognito
programme.desc: A group of disgraced yet highly-skilled operatives hope to seek redemption as they take on dangerous covert missions and fight against the enemy they unwittingly uncovered.

programme.title: The Iron Heart

programme.title: I Think I'm In Love
programme.desc: Jonas is known for being a rich playboy. His elder brother, Andrew, reprimands and challenges Jonas to establish a genuine friendship with any female for three months, or else he will lose his Porsche.

programme.title: Linlang
programme.desc: This mystery-thriller series revolves around an alluring woman named Juliana and her illicit affair with Alex, a lawyer who also happens to be the brother of Juliana's husband, Victor, a washed-up boxer. What is the story behind Juliana's betrayal and infidelity?

programme.title: Pompon Ours - EP 15
programme.desc: Seven year-old Pompon is a little bear cub. Thanks to his extraordinary imagination, growing up from day to day becomes child's play.

But this summer, the two sisters discover that their grandfather's estate is more than just a park: it is home to chimeras, amazing creatures with magical powers.

programme.title: Au Bout De L'enquete, La Fin Du Crime Parfait ? - EP 2
programme.desc: They are all cases that were closed, considered unsolvable, sometimes resisting police efforts for decades until a forgotten clue, an unhoped-for witness or a forensic innovation finally made it possible to unmask the culprit. Alongside Marie Drucker, the criminologist Alain Bauer explains the technical, psychological, sociological or historical elements involved.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Ness Et Rayan
programme.desc: Ness, an experienced police officer, catches young Rayan in the act as he tries to steal her wallet. Sentenced to perform community service in a police station, Rayan must serve as driver for the woman who arrested him.

programme.title: Fleuve En Eaux Troubles - EP 3
programme.desc: The harbor seal of the St. Lawrence is a key indicator of the river's health. While its population remains stable, other species, like the harp seal, overpopulate the region, threatening ecosystem balance and local biodiversity.

programme.title: Festa Major
programme.desc: In a village in the Pyrenees-Orientales, a ritual that has lasted for a hundred years takes place every year at the end of summer: a large popular celebration spread over five days. The camera films this ode to joy, lightness and sharing like a timeless tableau.

programme.title: Anushan
programme.desc: The only son of Tamil parents, 13-year-old Anushan much prefers rap to his native culture. When his uncle arrives from Sri Lanka, he finds himself sharing his room and his daily life with him for a few days.

programme.title: La Nourrice
programme.desc: Disabled following a work accident, Yara spends his time at home assembling miniature models, under the reproaches of his wife. Drug traffickers have also chosen him to secretly guard their loot. Until the day when some disturbing delivery men show up at his door.

programme.title: Lakay Nou - EP 5
programme.desc: To finish renovating the restaurant as quickly as possible, Henri calls on Father Moses for his help. But a discovery made during the work forces both Myrlande and Henri to react quickly.

programme.title: Lakay Nou - EP 6
programme.desc: Henri seeks the approval of his parents-in-law and organises a tasting dinner for them to test his future menu. Meanwhile Myrlande decides to spoil herself with the bonus offered by her boss.

programme.title: Lakay Nou - EP 7
programme.desc: Henri hopes that everything will be perfect for the official opening of his restaurant whilst Judeline wants to use the event as an opportunity to make an important announcement.

programme.title: Lakay Nou - EP 8
programme.desc: The family takes part in a television documentary that is supposed to promote the restaurant. Unfortunately, the journalist seems to have a different agenda...

But this summer, the two sisters discover that their grandfather's estate is more than just a park: it is home to chimeras, amazing creatures with magical powers.

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Le Point
programme.desc: Magazine programme which explores issues relating to society, science and the environment, involving investigations and in-depth analysis, from a resolutely Canadian perspective.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Le Monde Apres Nous
programme.desc: In Paris, Labidi shares a small single-room apartment and survives thanks to scamming and part-time jobs. He dreams of being a writer, but when he meets elisa he is forced to reconsider his lifestyle.

programme.title: 47 Pouces
programme.desc: One night, seven-year-old Zelie sees her Aunt Clara arrive at the family home. The young woman is sad, has bandages on her wrists and does not leave her room.

programme.title: A La Fontaine
programme.desc: Alice is at a crucial stage of her high school life: she has to determine her future career and choose a university. Stressed, she turns to her favorite teacher and her best friend, Julien. But Julien does not answer her messages.

programme.title: Capitaine Marleau - EP 29
programme.desc: During a reenacted duel, a participant is fatally injured by a weapon that was supposed to be fake. The shooter? A high profile lawyer with whom Marleau has old scores to settle. A new battle begins between the captain and the main suspect, who claims he is being framed.

programme.title: Movie - Natpe Thunai
programme.desc: Prabhakaran, a former hockey player, helps a local team save their ground by training them to win a match against the Pondicherry team. However, a corrupt politician has his eyes set on the ground.

programme.title: Movie - Kanden Kadhalai
programme.desc: Sakthivel and Anjali are poles apart in attitude. Circumstances bring them together and Anjali's parents believe they are in love. But they soon part ways after Anjali elopes to meet her lover.

programme.title: Movie - Pathinettu Vayasu Puyaley
programme.desc: This story is about 18-year-olds who let their imagination run riot. The scenes that happened in Preethi Varma's real life are reflected in this film.

programme.title: Movie - Pathirama Pathukonga
programme.desc: Sabari, a young man, falls in love with Indra, a college girl, and proposes to her. However she rejects his proposal as she is engaged, so Sabari befriends her fiance to break up their relationship.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Kaalamellam Kaathal Vaazhga
programme.desc: A young college girl, who is a great music enthusiast, becomes friends with a boy who is a good singer. Although they only talk on the phone and have never met, they fall in love with each other.

programme.title: Movie - Anbe Anbe
programme.desc: Cheenu and Shiva are cousins who live in a joint family. Trouble brews in their lives when their relative arrives with their daughter Vaishali, and both men fall in love with her.

programme.title: Movie - Kadal Meengal
programme.desc: Fisherman Selvam and Bhagyam are separated by fate. Selvam becomes a powerful man in the city while Bhagyam raises their son Rajan, who learns about his father's betrayal and seeks revenge.

programme.title: Movie - Oruvan
programme.desc: After a fireman loses his wife and only son in an unfortunate accident, he finds solace in bringing up an orphan boy as his own.

programme.title: Movie - Kodi
programme.desc: Twins Kodi and Anbu have different personalities: while one is into politics, the other is a pacifist. But a twist in their fates causes one to adopt the other's life and seek revenge.

programme.title: Movie - Kathavarayan
programme.desc: Kathavarayan, an illegal liquor dealer, faces trouble when a student, who vows to expose those who flout the law, gets him arrested.

programme.title: Movie - Pattam Parakkattum
programme.desc: Thyagu, a poor graduate, tries to get work to treat his father's visual disability. He falls in love with his neighbour, but her parents are not keen on her marriage since her salary is dearer to them.

programme.title: Movie - Pavalakodi
programme.desc: In school, Shiva never disclosed his love for Paval. Seven year later, he hires Robert to find her. Robert falls in love with Paval and lies to Shiva that she is now a fat, unmarried mother of three.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Deiva Vaakku
programme.desc: Hamsaveni's divine power earns her respect among the villagers, whereas her brother Vallatharai tries to exploit her power for his personal gain. He goes to the extent of sabotaging her marriage.

programme.title: Movie - Gol Mall
programme.desc: Ganesh, a young man, falls in love with Aishwarya, whose father is a strict man and does not approve of their union. Ganesh plans to get himself and Aishwarya kidnapped with the help of his friends.

programme.title: Movie - Shankar Guru
programme.desc: Shankar Guru, an honest man, fights for the rights of poor people. When Seeta falls in love with him, a few gangsters try to attack her to teach Shankar a lesson.

programme.title: Movie - Uttama Purushan
programme.desc: Raghu, a married man, tries to have an extra-marital affair with his secretary and asks her to come to a hotel room. However, he gets accused of murdering a woman who stayed in the neighbouring room.

programme.title: Movie - Thalaivaa
programme.desc: Vishwa runs a small business in Sydney, unaware that his father is a gangster in Mumbai. When his father is killed by a rival, Vishwa takes over his crime syndicate, with revenge on his mind.

programme.title: NETBUSTERS - ERLING HAALAND'S 100
programme.desc: We celebrate Erling Haaland's record-breaking haul in true Netbusters' style, showcasing every one of his 100 Premier League goals, squeezed into a special 26-minute show.

programme.title: PL GOATS - EP 5
programme.desc: Julia Stuart is joined by Ian Wright, Kolo Toure & Mikel John Obi to discuss the influence of African football on the Premier League.

programme.title: REVIEW - SUN 14 SEP
programme.desc: After the international break, Review is back with highlights from Matchweek 4, starting with Arsenal facing Nottingham Forest, Everton hosting Villa, and the Manchester derby as United take on City at the Etihad.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 40
programme.desc: Tyler Adams' story is one of dedication, commitment and sacrifice. From the early days when his mother would drive him hundreds of miles to training to pursue a dream, to the influence of his stepfather and three brothers, Adams' journey from MLS prospect to Premier League star has been a fascinating one.

programme.title: PL BEST OF... PREMIER LEAGUE FRENCH CONNECTION
programme.desc: A celebration of France's greatest football icons, featuring Thierry Henry, David Ginola, Robert Pires, Claude Makelele, Emmanuel Petit and many more.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 24
programme.desc: We head to London to unveil the two newest inductee's into the Premier League Hall of fame. Hosted by Kelly Cates, and with a who's who of footballing royalty in attendance, we go behind the curtain to give you exclusive access to the hottest ticket in town.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 27
programme.desc: We sit down for an exclusive interview with the second of two new Premier League Hall of fame inductees, Gary Neville. From his journey from Class of '92 prodigy to Premier League Hall of Fame icon, he talks us through the moments that defined his legacy at Manchester United. A story on one of the league's most influential right-backs and a leader whose impact still shapes English football today.

programme.title: NETBUSTERS - ERLING HAALAND'S 100
programme.desc: We celebrate Erling Haaland's record-breaking haul in true Netbusters' style, showcasing every one of his 100 Premier League goals, squeezed into a special 26-minute show.

programme.title: GOALS OF THE SEASON - 2025/2026 (HAALAND)
programme.desc: From free-kicks to solo runs, scissor kicks to 30-yard screamers, Goals of the Season revisits some of the most memorable strikes from the 25/26 campaign, whilst paying homage to the Golden Boot winner.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 2
programme.desc: Ahead of the World Cup, we revisit the rise of current USA manager Mauricio Pochettino's unforgettable Tottenham Hotspur side; the team that transformed Spurs from top-four hopefuls into genuine challengers at home and in Europe. Playing fearless, high-intensity football and built around a young core of stars, Pochettino's Spurs came within touching distance of Premier League and Champions League glory, creating some of the club's greatest modern nights along the way.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 1
programme.desc: We sit down with Lee Bowyer to look back on the career of one of the Premier League's fiercest and most competitive midfielders. From his rise at Charlton to becoming a key figure in the brilliant Leeds United side that challenged Europe's elite and reached the Champions League semi-finals, Bowyer reflects on the highs, controversies and defining moments of his career, including spells with West Ham, Newcastle and Birmingham.

programme.title: REVIEW - MON 20 OCT
programme.desc: Review covers all the action from Matchweek 8, starting with the early kick-off between Nottingham Forest and Chelsea, moving on to Fulham's home clash with Arsenal at Craven Cottage, and concluding with the weekend's headline fixture: Liverpool versus Manchester United.

programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON - 2025/2026 (ARS)
programme.desc: As we wave goodbye to another action-packed and compelling Premier League campaign, Review of the Season takes you through the twists and turns of a gripping last 10 months. From how the title was won, the fight for European spots, and the battle to avoid relegation - all the key moments are covered from another scintillating season.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 52
programme.desc: Set against one of the most dramatic seasons in recent memory, we explore the enduring intensity of the North London rivalry between Arsenal and Tottenham Hotspur. We trace the origins of a feud shaped by geography, identity and decades of defining moments. We interweave the story of this season, which has reshaped the balance of power in North London and brings a fresh perspective to a rivalry already steeped in history.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 2
programme.desc: Ahead of the World Cup, we revisit the rise of current USA manager Mauricio Pochettino's unforgettable Tottenham Hotspur side; the team that transformed Spurs from top-four hopefuls into genuine challengers at home and in Europe. Playing fearless, high-intensity football and built around a young core of stars, Pochettino's Spurs came within touching distance of Premier League and Champions League glory, creating some of the club's greatest modern nights along the way.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 1
programme.desc: We sit down with Lee Bowyer to look back on the career of one of the Premier League's fiercest and most competitive midfielders. From his rise at Charlton to becoming a key figure in the brilliant Leeds United side that challenged Europe's elite and reached the Champions League semi-finals, Bowyer reflects on the highs, controversies and defining moments of his career, including spells with West Ham, Newcastle and Birmingham.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 49
programme.desc: We join Harry Kewell in Vietnam as he embraces a new chapter in coaching, reflecting on a career that took him from prodigious talent to Premier League star. Kewell revisits his electrifying rise at Leeds United, before confronting the intense scrutiny and expectation that came with his move to Liverpool and then Galatasaray. He opens up about the injuries, pressure, and moments at Anfield that nearly drove him away from the game altogether.

programme.title: FS MMA Rafael Dias vs. Sami Aziz
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu black belt and American Top Team product Rafael Dias faces off against Sami "Uzi" Aziz in Costa Rica.

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Paul Williams vs. Verno Phillips
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features Junior Middleweights Paul "The Punisher" Williams (35-1, 26 KOs) and Verno Phillips (42-10, 21 KOs) as they battle for the vacant WBO Interim Belt at the Citizens Business Bank Arena in Ontario, California, USA, on November 29, 2008.

programme.title: Greatest Classics Marco Antonio Barrera vs. Agapito Sanchez
programme.desc: With the WBO Super Bantamweight World Championship on the line, titleholder Marco Antonio Barrera of Mexico takes on Dominican challenger Agapito Sanchez in front of a hot crowd at the Civic Center in South Padre Island, Texas. This would be the third defense for Barrera, who claimed the title with a decision victory over Daniel Jimenez earlier in the year. Sanchez was a worthy contender to the title, giving the 37-0 champion a much tougher challenge than he expected.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Bernard Hopkins vs. Chad Dawson
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is Bernard Hopkins facing off with Chad Dawson in a light heavyweight championship rematch from their controversial October 2011 bout. Also on the card, action from former welterweight champ James Kirkland.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Episode 4 from Ryogoku Kokugikan in Tokyo, Japan features Takayasu, Mitakeumi, Myogiryu and Meisei.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: American Ninja Warrior travels back to San Jose, California where the top 30 competitors from the Military Qualifier tackle the Military Finals course. In addition to the obstacles from the Military Qualifier, contestants will face Salmon Ladder, Arm Rings, Doorknob Arch and Spider Climb. Top competitors Army National Guard Caption Ryan Stratis, active Navy Lieutenant Junior Grade Dustin McKinney and Coast Guard Aviation Survival Technician Robin Pietschmann will take on the course.

programme.title: FS MMA Rafael Dias vs. Sami Aziz
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu black belt and American Top Team product Rafael Dias faces off against Sami "Uzi" Aziz in Costa Rica.

programme.desc: With the WBO Super Bantamweight World Championship on the line, titleholder Marco Antonio Barrera of Mexico takes on Dominican challenger Agapito Sanchez in front of a hot crowd at the Civic Center in South Padre Island, Texas. This would be the third defense for Barrera, who claimed the title with a decision victory over Daniel Jimenez earlier in the year. Sanchez was a worthy contender to the title, giving the 37-0 champion a much tougher challenge than he expected.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Bernard Hopkins vs. Chad Dawson
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is Bernard Hopkins facing off with Chad Dawson in a light heavyweight championship rematch from their controversial October 2011 bout. Also on the card, action from former welterweight champ James Kirkland.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Episode 4 from Ryogoku Kokugikan in Tokyo, Japan features Takayasu, Mitakeumi, Myogiryu and Meisei.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: American Ninja Warrior travels back to San Jose, California where the top 30 competitors from the Military Qualifier tackle the Military Finals course. In addition to the obstacles from the Military Qualifier, contestants will face Salmon Ladder, Arm Rings, Doorknob Arch and Spider Climb. Top competitors Army National Guard Caption Ryan Stratis, active Navy Lieutenant Junior Grade Dustin McKinney and Coast Guard Aviation Survival Technician Robin Pietschmann will take on the course.

programme.title: FS MMA Rafael Dias vs. Sami Aziz
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu black belt and American Top Team product Rafael Dias faces off against Sami "Uzi" Aziz in Costa Rica.

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Edison Miranda vs. Willie Gibbs
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features Super Middleweights Edison Miranda (26-2, 23 KOs) vs. Willie 'The Gladiator' Gibbs (20-1, 16 KOs) from the Miccosukee Indian Gaming Resort in Miami, Florida, USA. Bonus coverage includes Jason Litzau, aka 'The American Boy' (20-1, 18 KOs) vs. Jose Hernandez (21-3, 13 KOs).

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Jermain Taylor vs. Jeff Lacy
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features former Middleweight Champion Jermain 'Bad Intentions' Taylor (27-2, 17 KOs) in a back and forth battle with Jeff "Left Hook' Lacy (24-1, 17 KOs) in a WBC Super Middleweight Title Eliminator on November 15, 2008 from the Vanderbilt University Memorial Gymnasium in Nashville, Tennessee, USA.

programme.title: Fight Quest
programme.desc: Episode 2: Denfeng, China - Hosts Jimmy Smith and Doug Anderson learn the Fight Discipline of Wushu and Sanda and the Martial Art of Hands, Feet and Breaking with Masters Shi DeYang and Shi De Cheng.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Juan Manuel Marquez vs. Michael Katsidis
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a highly-praised and hard-hitting lightweight championship fight featuring Juan Manuel Marquez and Michael Katsidis that was named HBO's 2010 Fight of the Year. Also on the card, welterweight champion Victor Ortiz.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. Episode 5 from from Ryogoku Kokugikan in Tokyo, Japan features Shodai, Takayasu, Tobizaru and Takakeisho.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Saul (Canelo) Alvarez vs. Kermit Cintron
programme.desc: This episode features Saul (Canelo) Alvarez defending the WBC light middleweight title against Kermit Cintron, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: Bipolar Rock n' Roller
programme.desc: A raw and unflinching account of Mauro Ranallo's decades-long struggle with Bipolar Affective Disorder. The voice of WWE and Showtime Championship Boxing, Ranallo has called some of the biggest sports events in history - all the while fighting his own epic battles with mental health Follow his journey in this 3-part series, as he combats the stigma behind mental health issues and sheds light on what it's like being at the top of the industry despite seemingly insurmountable odds.

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA Amanda Lino vs. Rizlen Zouak
programme.desc: This episode features a women's banthamweight championship as Amanda 'Mad Dog' Lino and Rizlen 'The Lioness of the Atlas' Zouak fight their way to Fight of the Night honors. Bonus coverage showcases more striking power with Mzawandile Hlongwa vs. Robert Swanepoel and Steve Nwosu vs. Quinton Rossouw. From EFC 70 in Sibaya Casino, Durbin, South Africa on 26-May-2018.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Edwin Rodriguez vs. Jason Escalera
programme.desc: This episode features a USBA super middleweight title bout that sees Edwin Rodriguez defend against the undefeated Jason Escalera.

programme.title: BWF Martial Arts
programme.desc: This episode features highlights from the Men's Forms Championship at the ISKA US Open Championships held at Disney World, Orlando, FL, USA.

programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode, we see the best of the Judo Grand Slam from Baku and the #2 world ranked fighter, Michael Korrell, talks judo.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Andre Berto vs. Freddy Hernandez
programme.desc: The main event in this episode sees Andre Berto defend the WBC welterweight championship against Freddy Hernandez. With one quick, hard right hand to the face in the first round, this bout comes to a sudden halt. Berto looks to keep his undefeated streak alive and thrust himself into talks for bigger fights with the likes of stars such as Floyd Mayweather. Also on the card, Jean Pascal looks for an upset in the light heavyweight division.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. Episode 1 from Ryogoku Kokugikan in Tokyo, Japan features Takakeisho, Onosho, Kotoshoho and Daieisho.

programme.desc: This episode features a Super Lightweight bloody battle between Marcos Rene Maidana making his US debut and a very young Victor Ortiz, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 2
programme.desc: The Squirrels are looking for Duggee but can't find him. Instead, they find someone they think is Enid, only much too big... Duggee has painted his face to look like Enid! Of course, the Squirrels want their faces painted too, so Duggee sets to it.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 3
programme.desc: When Duggee's old friend Rhodri goes home after a visit, he forgets his favourite hat. No worries, the Squirrels can run after him and give it back. They take all sorts of transport to catch Rhodri, and he is always one step ahead. Until finally, they're on a raft across the sea and land right by Rhodri's front door.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 4
programme.desc: Out for a walk, the Squirrels spot an interesting poster - it's King Tiger advertising his Roar Talent Show. Naturally, the Squirrels are very keen to take part. First, they need to find their talents. After they spend some time searching, Narrator explains that 'finding their talents' means working out what they are good at. So, the Squirrels practise their skills until they are ready to face an audience.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 5
programme.desc: Duggee is encouraging the Squirrels to come outside by gesturing through the window. They don't understand what he's doing and think it's funny. When he comes inside, a bit exasperated, he explains that he was miming. They want to know what miming is, and Duggee fondly recalls his days as a young Parisian street performer. The Squirrels are keen to learn how to mime, and Duggee runs them through the basics.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 6
programme.desc: All the Squirrels are having a fine old time playing with the hose. All except one, poor Tag whose feet hurt. 'Why do my feet hurt?', he asks Duggee. While Duggee has a think, he tells them 'why' is a great question, and the Squirrels are quick to follow up.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 17
programme.desc: The Squirrels play Copy the King!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 18
programme.desc: The Squirrel club play games involving animals. The chickens do some rhythmic office work.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 19
programme.desc: More fun with Duggee, biscuits, eggs, toys and of course milkshakes.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 20
programme.desc: When Duggee finds some seeds it's time for some gardening!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 21
programme.desc: Duggie chooses a key and his blue digger to dig up a big bone. The chipmunk makes a delivery to the squirrels.

programme.title: Teletubbies S01 - EP 108
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po watch bunny rabbits. Bunny ears and tails appear on the Teletubbies. They do the 'bunny hop hop' before saying 'eh oh' to the Tiddlytubbies.

programme.title: Teletubbies Ready Steady Go! S01 - EP 2
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are back together like you've never seen them before!

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 36
programme.desc: Judo desperately wants to play in the dirt with Bluey and Bingo, but she is not supposed to get herself dirty.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 37
programme.desc: The Heelers and Lucky's family get together to watch the big game, a fun family experiences that gets a little tense.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 38
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo build a very special cubby for their stuffed toy Kimjim.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 39
programme.desc: Dad thinks he needs to do some exercise, but Bingo pretends to be Boss Bluey's new employee in the middle of Dad's backyard workout.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 40
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo would rather explore their holiday hotel room than relax on the beach.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S23 - EP 14
programme.desc: While working on the Chinese railway, Thomas misses his friend Percy, and takes a trip down the memory lane.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S23 - EP 15
programme.desc: Darcy the tunnel boring machine makes some mistakes on her first day, but she soon makes up for it when everyone sees what she can really do.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S23 - EP 16
programme.desc: A bit bored by her surroundings, Emily longs to go on a fun adventure and experience something new and exciting. It's not long before her wish is granted.

programme.title: Go Jetters S02 - EP 40
programme.desc: While in Mexico Glitch takes a short cut through the Cave of Crystals, a very hot hidden space that contains some of the biggest crystals in the world! The clumsy Grandmaster falls off one of the crystals and into a deep ravine. Glitch and the Grimbots are in trouble, can the Go Jetters rescue them with the help of their brand new GO Suits before things get too hot to handle!?

programme.title: Go Jetters S02 - EP 41
programme.desc: Glitch plunges the sea into darkness in a night-time adventure near the Isles of Scilly.

programme.title: Go Jetters S02 - EP 42
programme.desc: Uh oh! Glitch accidently uses his size-ray to shrink the Go Jetters and Ubercorn so that they are the size of ants!

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops S01 - EP 14
programme.desc: Preston needs Mojo's racer top speed to get his new plane off the ground. But when his flight goes wrong, Mojo and Bo have to take to the air in Mojo's jet top to help him down!

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops S01 - EP 15
programme.desc: Farmer Jackson was just trying to grow some giant tomatoes, but he wound up with a giant pig! Now, Mojo and Bo have to get Felix back to normal size before Swoppiton gets stomped.

programme.title: Supertato S01 - EP 1
programme.desc: Evil Pea and the Mini Peas take over the Tato Tower HQ and lock Supertato out.

programme.title: Supertato S01 - EP 2
programme.desc: Chilli's heat helps Supertato to stop Evil Pea from freezing over the whole supermarket.

programme.title: Supertato S01 - EP 3
programme.desc: It's a space race to fulfil Carrot's dream of being the first Veggie on the cheese moon.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 14
programme.desc: Duggee is playing with his train set. Choo-choo! It's amazing! The squirrels are curious and want to know all about it. Duggee explains that it is a toy but it works exactly like a real train. Hennie arrives and she has a train too. The squirrels ask if they can play with it. You can't play with it; you can play IN it says Hennie.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 15
programme.desc: The Squirrels help Duggee try out his new outdoor pizza oven. Duggee makes the bases, then the Squirrels each put on all the toppings they like best. Some of their combinations are ... interesting!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 16
programme.desc: Duggee's not very well, he's lost his voice. The Squirrels want to make him feel better. Duggee tries to tell them that he needs some water but the Squirrels don't quite understand, so they ask all the other animals for advice. Does anyone have the answer?

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 17
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels are going camping. They need to find somewhere to pitch their tent but it's not as easy as they thought it would be. They all work together and finally get settled. Then things start to unravel when the squirrels hear a scary noise outside the tent. What can it be? All sorts of things are imagined. DUGGEE!!

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 37
programme.desc: Princesses, horses and magic wands. Bluey and Chloe can play any role they want, when they embark on an adventure to save their playground kingdom from the Greedy Queen.

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 38
programme.desc: Bluey's having fun copying everything Dad says and does, but the game takes a serious turn when Bluey finds a hurt budgie and they have to make an emergency trip to the vet.

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 39
programme.desc: A sleepover with their cousin means Bluey and Bingo get to stay up late! But when Muffin shows up exhausted after missing her nap, the girls get more fun than they bargained for.

programme.title: Andy's Global Adventures S01 - EP 14
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head off on a global adventure to crystal river in Florida, North America, to find out how manatees survive the cold water in winter.

programme.title: Andy's Global Adventures S01 - EP 15
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head to Bird Island in Antarctica to help rescue a grey-headed albatross chick that gets blown off its nest during a storm.

programme.title: Teletubbies S01 - EP 66
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are about to go on the Tubby Custard Ride with the hat, bag, ball and scooter when they realise there is not enough room. The Noo-­Noo looks after their things.

programme.title: Yakka Dee S05 - EP 20
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say `snow', and goes on a whirlwind word adventure. They see lots of snow, cold snow, falling snow, twinkly snow and yummy snow. There's sparkly snow and sledging snow, and Dee and Penguin have fun throwing snow.

programme.desc: When Mayor Oki wants to build a new tower, Messy is keen to help. There is just one problem - all his towers fall over...

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 10
programme.desc: It's a lovely day, so everyone is playing outside. Things take a turn when Roly needs a wee, because the door is locked and Duggee has mislaid the key. The Squirrels start looking around for it, but they have no luck. Not to worry, Duggee has his metal detector, Helen. After demonstrating it to the Squirrels, they are very keen to give it a go.

programme.desc: More fun with Duggee, biscuits, eggs, toys and of course milkshakes.

programme.desc: The Squirrel club play games involving animals. The chickens do some rhythmic office work.

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 31
programme.desc: In a game of 'Work', Dad hires Bluey and Bingo at his drainpipe factory. But when Bluey takes charge, Dad finds his new boss pretty tough, especially her no dancing rule.

programme.title: Bluey S02 - EP 34
programme.desc: In the park Bluey meets a new playmate Winnie, but when Bluey wants to invite her and her dad home for breakfast, she learns that adults take a little bit longer to make friends.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 2
programme.desc: Mum sets up a backyard obstacle course just for fun, but Dad wants to race! Now the kids are determined to win by any means necessary.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 3
programme.desc: Bluey keeps breaking her promises! But after seeing how much Bingo trusts Mum's word, Bluey learns the power of promises and why it's important not to break them.

programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit the Fortress of Fun, where Kingsley and Queenie have fun looking for peas with the Playtimers in their Pea Party game.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 6
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels go on an adventure to find a famously shy creature called The Snard who doesn't like noise time to earn their Being Quiet badges!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 5
programme.desc: A weather warning from Duggee's barometer leads the Squirrels to round up all the creatures they can find outside and pile into the clubhouse for an impromptu party.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 4
programme.desc: The Squirrels meet a chameleon called Cosey and learn about how to blend into their surroundings, earning their Camouflage Badges in the process!

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 17
programme.desc: Ubercorn and Glitch head to the Svalbard Global Seed Vault. But, just like when they were cadets together, the two of them get into trouble. Glitch accidentally crashes the Grimbler into the vault.

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 16
programme.desc: With the help of his hero Ron Allum, Lars plans to dive to the bottom of the Mariana Trench in a submersible called the Deep Sea Challenger. Glitch plans to beat him there by sending a Grimbot in his Grimsub, but it can't withstand the heavy pressure of the water. Lars and Xuli must work together to mount a rescue operation at the bottom of the sea.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S23 - EP 7
programme.desc: While working on the Brazilian Railway, Thomas Meets Gustavo, another big blue engine who reminds him of Gordon back home.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck S03 - EP 16
programme.desc: After a night of strong rain, the Shallots set sail on a seafaring adventure.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck S03 - EP 17
programme.desc: Cake decides to teach Sarah and Duck how to decorate with icing!

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 18
programme.desc: The cicrus bus has broken down, but the children are waiting for a circus show! Can Stanley help out?

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 17
programme.desc: Stanley has to free Myrtle, who is stuck, using his new tunnelling mole machine so she can attend the schools tree planting day.

programme.title: Funny Talking Animals S01 - EP 2
programme.desc: From tickles and piggybacks to no longer being able to do cartwheels, grandparents are brilliant!

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran S01 - EP 38
programme.desc: When Neil the postie delivers Gran Gran's mail early in the morning, JoJo is amazed to discover that some grown-ups go to work when she's asleep. JoJo and Gran Gran spend the day learning all about night-time workers.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 32
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo hide under the house and spy on two mysterious tradies working in the backyard, wondering what they're up to.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 33
programme.desc: Muffin is playing Grouchy Granny at a garage sale, making Dad push her on an old mobility scooter, but when a real Grouchy Granny wants to buy it, Muffin won't budge.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 34
programme.desc: Mackenzie, Jack and Rusty are playing as astronauts on a mission to Mars, but during their journey, Mackenzie keeps going missing and no one knows why, not even Mackenzie.

programme.desc: Duggee is reading the Squirrels one of his favourite comics. They eagerly want to know the ending, but the comic was discontinued. Luckily Duggee has the comic badge, he can show the Squirrels how to create their own ending.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 33

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 35
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want Dad all to themselves and will not let Mum have a smoochy kiss. They try to hide him all around the house, but Mum is desperate to spend a little romance time with her husband.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 35
programme.desc: Roly has lost his best potato but Duggee finds it using his sense of smell. But what is a sense? Time for the Squirrels to learn about the five senses and earn their Senses Badge.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 34
programme.desc: Duggee is reading the Squirrels one of his favourite comics. They eagerly want to know the ending, but the comic was discontinued. Luckily Duggee has the comic badge, he can show the Squirrels how to create their own ending.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 25
programme.desc: The Super Squirrels are called to action! Time to stop Dr Catastrophe and save their toys!

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 48
programme.desc: The Westman Islands south of Iceland are home to one of the largest colonies of puffins in the world! Once a year puffins return to the land to lay a single egg and they often make their nests in underground burrows.

programme.title: Roots & Fruits S01 - EP 7
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's Cucumber performing Cool Under Pressure while trying to not let any obstacle ruin her calm routine.

programme.title: Roots & Fruits S01 - EP 6
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's Pumpkin demonstrating incredible strength and attempting to break a Roots and Fruits record.

programme.title: Supertato S01 - EP 6
programme.desc: Evil Pea swaps Supertato's Tato-Belt with her own evil Baddie-Belt.

programme.title: Supertato S01 - EP 7
programme.desc: Chilli becomes Super Chilli as he tries to be a superhero just like Supertato.

programme.title: Teletubbies S01 - EP 67
programme.desc: The Teletubbies enjoy doing 'Round and Round the Garden', especially the end of the rhyme where they all tickle each other. The Tiddlytubbies have tickly fun too.

programme.title: Yakka Dee S06 - EP 1
programme.desc: In this episode, Dee encourages a friend to say 'dinosaur', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see lots of dinosaurs - big, baby and scaly ones. There's a stomping dinosaur, a running dinosaur, a disco dinosaur, and even a drumming dinosaur! The journey is repeated with some special surprises along the way, and everyone has a boogie when Dee's friend finally succeeds in saying today's word!

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO S03 - EP 25
programme.desc: It's wash day in Okido. Messy travels with Zoe and Felix to the Okido launderette and learns just how much soap can be too much. Soon Okido is covered in bubbles and it's up to Messy to clean up.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops S01 - EP 38
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo have to deliver a superfun singing valentine. But the problem is, they don't know who it's for, or who it's from. Preston is racing to beat them to it!

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 38
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo build a very special cubby for their stuffed toy Kimjim.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 37
programme.desc: The Heelers and Lucky's family get together to watch the big game, a fun family experiences that gets a little tense.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 12
programme.desc: When they're accidentally shut in the shed, Duggee shows the Squirrels how to make the time pass with calm breathing and made-up games. The Squirrels cope so well. Does Duggee?

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 11
programme.desc: The Squirrels find Duggee's cheerleader pompoms, so he shows them his old moves. Time to practice: Duggee at the chess board, the Squirrels as a squad. There's a big match ahead...

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 20
programme.desc: When Duggee finds some seeds it's time for some gardening!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 19
programme.desc: More fun with Duggee, biscuits, eggs, toys and of course milkshakes.

programme.title: Go Jetters S01 - EP 13
programme.desc: What goes up must come down! Grandmaster Glitch lands with a splash in Lake Titicaca in South America.

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 32
programme.desc: Bingo is sick in hospital, so Bluey and Dad sent her a homemade video to lift her spirits. It tells the tale of Barnicus' quest to heal her spotty dog named Bumpy.

programme.title: Bluey S02 - EP 35
programme.desc: When Mum and Dad have a disagreement, Bluey makes Dad write a love letter to Mum to make up. Now Bluey must find a way to play Ground's Lava with Bingo and deliver the letter to Mum, without squabbling.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 3
programme.desc: Bluey keeps breaking her promises! But after seeing how much Bingo trusts Mum's word, Bluey learns the power of promises and why it's important not to break them.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 4
programme.desc: Bingo is helping Mum make an omelette for Dad's birthday breakfast, but cracking eggs is harder than it looks, and Dad is getting hungrier by the minute.

programme.title: Andy's Safari Adventures S01 - EP 26
programme.desc: Andy jets off in his safari-mobile to South America in search of an armadillo. He needs to photograph one for the front cover of a new magazine, but try as he might, it continually eludes him. Along the way, he meets a Mara and two squabbling Guanaco.

programme.title: Playtime Towers S01 - EP 7
programme.desc: Bella plays funny games with Lift using her colourful towel. Together, they visit Hettie in the Ice Disco, who uses a big towel to make up a new dance - the Butterfly Boogie!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 7
programme.desc: Duggee arranges for the Squirrels to write to some pen pals, helping them to learn all about life in far away places, earning their Pen Pal badges and making some new friends in the process!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 6
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels go on an adventure to find a famously shy creature called The Snard who doesn't like noise time to earn their Being Quiet badges!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 5
programme.desc: A weather warning from Duggee's barometer leads the Squirrels to round up all the creatures they can find outside and pile into the clubhouse for an impromptu party.

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 18
programme.desc: In Istanbul's Grand Bazaar, Glitch wishes he could buy everything. Hearing about the wishes granted by the Hen's Eye Column in an underground water store, the Basilica Cistern, Glitch heads beneath the earth and brings the entire cistern close to collapse!

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 17
programme.desc: Ubercorn and Glitch head to the Svalbard Global Seed Vault. But, just like when they were cadets together, the two of them get into trouble. Glitch accidentally crashes the Grimbler into the vault.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S23 - EP 8
programme.desc: While working on the Brazilian Railway, Thomas and Gabriela get ready for the Batucada carnival at the docks.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck S03 - EP 17
programme.desc: Cake decides to teach Sarah and Duck how to decorate with icing!

programme.title: Sarah and Duck S03 - EP 18
programme.desc: Sarah's hat goes on an adventure without her, on top of a balloon.

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 19
programme.desc: Stanley goes to help Myrtle, who has found a paint smudge on the Town Hall's door!

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 18
programme.desc: The cicrus bus has broken down, but the children are waiting for a circus show! Can Stanley help out?

programme.title: Funny Talking Animals S01 - EP 3
programme.desc: From astronauts to acrobats, the animals talk about all the things they want to be when they grow up.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran S01 - EP 39
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran are drinking hot chocolate in the park café when a robin lands on their table. JoJo learns that some birds fly away in the winter - that's called migration.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 33
programme.desc: Muffin is playing Grouchy Granny at a garage sale, making Dad push her on an old mobility scooter, but when a real Grouchy Granny wants to buy it, Muffin won't budge.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 34

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S2 - EP 203
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama have announced to their dear barbababies that they are going on a trip to Easter Island.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space S2 - EP 201
programme.desc: Tim explores Rumbleton to find somewhere he can have fun alone. // Tim and Kai try to give Parky the best day ever. // When a storm keeps the Rexes at home they must think of a game to pass the time.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space S2 - EP 207
programme.desc: Tim & Kai compete to get Terri's spare Space-Land ticket.

programme.title: Peppa Pig S1 - EP 105
programme.desc: Peppa and George decide to play a game of hide and seek.

programme.title: Peppa Pig S1 - EP 106
programme.desc: Peppa and George are going to daycare. It's George's first day at daycare, and he shows the class his interest in dinosaurs.

programme.title: Peppa Pig S1 - EP 107
programme.desc: Peppa accidentally crashes Mummy Pig's computer, so Daddy Pig tries to fix it.

programme.title: Peppa Pig S1 - EP 108
programme.desc: Peppa teaches George how to catch a ball, and later, they play Monkey in the Middle with Mummy Pig.

programme.title: Peppa Pig S1 - EP 103
programme.desc: Peppa Pig's best friend, Suzy Sheep, comes over to visit.

programme.title: Peppa Pig S1 - EP 104
programme.desc: Peppa and George visit Granny Pig and Grandpa Pig's house, and meet their new parrot, Polly.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S2 - EP 223
programme.desc: Barbidou's beautiful roses mysteriously disappeared during the night. // Barbapapa decides to tell the barbababies about the time he went to explore the Arctic and the seabed.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S1 - EP 121
programme.desc: Bali is nowhere to be found, and the Barbapapa deploy all their imagination to look for her. They have no idea that a nice surprise awaits them!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S5 - EP 517
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ are spending the day with some very special trucks: Blaze's family! His Mom, Dad, and little sister Sparkle join Blaze in a race against Crusher to prove they're the world's fastest family!

programme.title: PAW Patrol S2 - EP 220
programme.desc: It's the annual Mayor's Race, and Mayor Humdinger is planning his most devious cheating scheme yet. // When Ryder comes across a map for buried treasure, Mayor Humdinger snatches the map and runs off to find the loot for himself.

programme.title: PAW Patrol S6 - EP 606
programme.desc: Olivia the Ostrich has fallen in to the canyon! The pups need to work together to lift her to safety, while keeping her soon-to-hatch eggs warm.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew S3 - EP 307
programme.desc: When Motor needs help at the fire station, a new Fire Captain comes to town to help train all the pups as new firefighter recruits. // Charger can't wait to help Sierra Sparkle with her big show! Well, until his hurt paw causes a cone complication.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew S3 - EP 308
programme.desc: A flock of migrating ducks settles in Builder Cove! It's up to Rubble & Crew to help the ducks start moving south. // Motor doesn't want to visit Dr. Diwa at the Vet Clinic... so the pups build a special space just for her!

programme.title: DORA S2 - EP 205
programme.desc: Dora's crab friends are getting married but Swiper swipes the ring and loses it in the ocean. Dora has to get the ring back! / Dora and Boots meet Vicky the Vicuna who is missing her magic flute that she needs to go back to the Cloud Kingdom.

programme.title: DORA S2 - EP 206
programme.desc: Dora and Boots take Claudia, an energetic young rain cloud, to rain on a dry water slide. / Boots gets a case of Tickle Tail that Ranita the Frog can cure if she gets her magic stripes by helping friends around the Rainforest.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S1 - EP 118
programme.desc: The barbababies prepare a show for Barbamama's birthday. While Barbalala finishes up, they go to the carnival where Barbabeau gets stuck in an attraction. // Three separate stories telescope into a big final bouquet in the middle of the courtyard.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S1 - EP 120
programme.desc: Barbalib, Barbalala and Barbabelle take turns as narrators to tell a story, each one bringing a very personal touch to it. // The Barbapapa family spends a day at the beach. Divided into 2 teams, the barbababies fight over a sandy peninsula.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S1 - EP 121
programme.desc: A goat has escaped from the mountain and is coming to wreak havoc, devouring everything in its path! // Bali is nowhere to be found, and the Barbapapa deploy all their imagination to look for her. They have no idea that a nice surprise awaits them!

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S1 - EP 122
programme.desc: Barbabright acts strangely. What is he hiding ? The Barbabbabies will do anything to find out. // The Barbapapa decide to save energy. But their efforts are undermined by Barbabright and Barbabelle who build a secret energy-consuming project.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S1 - EP 123
programme.desc: The barbababies are glued to the TV. Since they love it so much, their parents encourage them to make their own shows. // The Barbapapa visit the museum of evolution. On the program: creation of the Earth, Precambrian submarine and... dinosaurs!

programme.title: Rubble & Crew S1 - EP 102
programme.desc: Rubble and the pups work to build a big bike shop in time for the Bike Festival... unless Speed Meister beats them to it! // When Motor won't take a bath before their family photo, it's up to Rubble and the pups to find a construction solution.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew S1 - EP 103
programme.desc: When a windy day derails construction on an ice cream shop, Rubble, Mix, Wheeler, and Charger are on the chase. // There's a mysterious squeak in City Hall. Mayor Greatway asks Rubble and Charger to find and fix the squeak before her big speech!

programme.title: PAW Patrol S7 - EP 705
programme.desc: Mr. Porter's high tech waiter robot helps around the cafe, but it can't stop cleaning! It's up to the Pups to clean up the mess all over town! // Mayor Humdinger creates a cyclone of delicious pies! The Pups must stop it before the town is covered.

programme.title: PAW Patrol S7 - EP 710
programme.desc: Myrna the Mynah bird leads her feathered friends astray and it's up to the Paw Patrol to rescue the wayward flock. // Adventure Bay is holding a kids only soapbox derby race when a mysterious newcomer named ''Hum-Kid'' shows up and breaks the rules!

programme.title: Deer Squad S3 - EP 308
programme.desc: Bobbi's galactic flapjacks attract a spaceship from another galaxy. It's Captain Chomp and her co-pilot, Kenny a prehistoric mammoth! // Steel uses a super-growth fertiliser to grow giant cacti flowers to replace Lady Fluffpot's bottle of perfume.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S1 - EP 125
programme.desc: Following a misadventure, Barbabravo is unable to transform at all. The whole family unites to help him. // Barbabravo can't stay put and is unable to focus one an activity for very long. Barbalala offers to teach him control. Will she succeed?

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space S1 - EP 109
programme.desc: Tim does all he can to get the new DinoStar toy. // It's a day for practical jokes, but Tim doesn't know when to stop. // Tim and Dad have to catch a troublesome mole.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew S1 - EP 110
programme.desc: A new farmer in town asks Rubble & Crew to build a barn for her pig! But will it be done in time for the big Pig Party? // Motor's super special birthday present gets delayed when the pups realize Builder Cove's airport needs a bigger runway.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew S1 - EP 111
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build Builder Cove's first ever Fire Station, complete with an inspection from Paw Patrol's Marshall! But when Speed Meister's sneaky sabotage traps Marshall's Fire Truck, the pups work together to put out a fire construction-style.

programme.title: DORA S4 - EP 409
programme.desc: Dora and Boots become mermaids and help Marisol the Mermaid save her home, Sirena Sea! // Dora and Boots go across the sea to help their dolphin friend find the best gift ever, a magic jewel!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S7 - EP 707
programme.desc: AJ is entering in the Axle City Flying Contest. But when Crusher sends him and Blaze away, they must get back in time for AJ to build his super-cool flying invention!

programme.title: Mr. Crocodile S1 - EP 106
programme.desc: When Winston won't play with Lydia, Daisy and Mr. Crocodile create an imaginary friend for her. // Mr. Crocodile helps Daisy fish-sit for Martin, but worries he won't be able to stop himself from eating it.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S1 - EP 112
programme.desc: The barbababies discover a strange cave. Barbalib tells the story of the caves Barbapapa and how they transformed. // The Barbababies have a sleepover in the living room. Fearing the monsters in the closet, they set up wacky traps to catch them.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S1 - EP 113

programme.title: Rupert Bear S1 - EP 27

They open it expecting to find sandwiches or even a cake but get more than they expected when hiccups jump out of the box instead. They try to run away from the hiccups but crash into the travelling salesman and his colourful cart and upset a box of yawns and a box of giggling noises too. Rupert, Bill, Freddy and Freda discover that the noises are very infectious

programme.title: Rupert Bear S1 - EP 28
programme.desc: When Rupert, Bill and Ping-Pong arrive at the beach one sunny day they are amazed to find a small snowstorm raging over one distinct area. Jack Frost emerges and explains that he has come early this year because he wants to catch some sun. He shows them the snowglobe he uses to control the icy storm. The friends play in the snow unaware that Ming has got hold of the snowglobe and is shaking it up, causing the storm to grow out of control....

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Kelp and Pixie forget about their little sisters and their plans to hang out. Scallop goes to Unicorn Land and meets Juniper. But when CatRat gets stuck inside the book, Gabby and Pandy must go on a doodle rescue mission to save him.

For the COTD segment, Cakey and Parrot show us how to make adorable safari snacks.

programme.desc: The gang heads to “Best Fans Day” at NY’s Giraffe Stadium, where Alex gets caught up in the attention of rooting for the winning team. When his behavior ends up hurting Marty’s feelings, Alex comes to learn that the only team that matters is the one that’s made up of his friends.

programme.desc: Kelp and Pixie forget about their little sisters and their plans to hang out. Scallop goes to Unicorn Land and meets Juniper. programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 8

Then, when the egg hatches, they meet Eggy, the Easter Kitty Bunny! For our Cat of the Day segment, Baby Box gets crafty.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: The gang heads to the Museum of Dinosaurs. But Gloria becomes obsessed with her handheld video game and misses out on what's in front of her, and ends up creating a disaster of colossal proportions.

programme.desc: After hearing spooky rumors about the new habitat resident- A BAT- Marty is determined to protect his friends from the newcomer. But when the bat helps him out of a tough situation, Marty learns it’s better to get to know someone rather than judge them on false stereotypes.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 24

Determined to help him get his groove back, Gabby and Pandy take him on a musical search through the dollhouse. As they go, Gabby uses the microphone to record sounds from the Gabby Cats’ everyday activities that culminate into a new song that gets DJ his groove back just in time for the show! programme.desc: Imagine a world where marinara sauce isn't part of the American palate. That was true sixty years ago, when food conglomerate Campbell's kickstarted what would become an Italian American food revolution.

programme.title: Holy Marvels With Dennis Quaid (S1) - EP 7
programme.desc: Most of the world's holiest places sit in plain sight. But there are some hidden. The revered tomb of Jesus Christ and a prehistoric temple in Malta with mystical properties-why were they concealed?

programme.title: Pawn Stars (S24) - EP 612
programme.desc: When a seller comes in with a poster by Henri de Toulouse-Lautrec, will it make an impression on Rick, or will he bid adieu? Chum finds some 1912 Yale baseball uniforms. Is it a home run or a strikeout?

programme.title: How Disney Built America - EP 3
programme.desc: Walt Disney overcomes immense obstacles to create the first theme park, where instead of thrill rides, he gives the visitor an immersive journey into a story, like the experience of being inside a movie.

programme.title: Hazardous History With Henry Winkler (S1) - EP 6
programme.desc: From exploding cars and blimp disasters to kids sent through the mail and doomed personal helicopters, the past is packed with jaw-dropping travel tales that paved the road to modern transportation.

programme.title: World War II with Tom Hanks - EP 7
programme.desc: As Hitler's reach extends beyond Germany and darkness descends on Europe, his hateful rhetoric leads to anti-Jewish persecution and ultimately, genocide.

programme.title: World War II with Tom Hanks - EP 8
programme.desc: In Operation Torch, the first joint U.S.-British offensive of the war, thousands of inexperienced U.S. troops face off against the hardened German Afrika Korps and the infamous Field Marshall Erwin Rommel.

programme.title: Lost U-Boats Of WWII - EP 2
programme.desc: Treasure hunter Darrell Miklos' search for treasure-filled, lost Nazi U-Boats takes an unexpected turn when a 98-year-old local eyewitness gives him a tip that changes the course of his investigation.

programme.title: The Bermuda Triangle: Into Cursed Waters (S2) - EP 5
programme.desc: Do new leads point the way to the biggest Bermuda Triangle mystery of all? Mike Barnette, Jimmy Gadomski and the team of investigators are back on the trail of a cold case that keeps them up at night.

programme.title: Swamp People (S14) - EP 5
programme.desc: Anna takes aim at swamp monsters with her bow and arrow. Pickle surprises Troy with her secret weapon. Little Willie breaks news to his dad that transforms their season.

programme.title: Homicide Squad New Orleans (S1) - EP 2
programme.desc: Detective Rayell Johnson investigates the murder of a 42-year-old New Orleans native, who was gunned down in his truck on a stormy night.

programme.title: Ozark Law (S1) - EP 2
programme.desc: Detective Sergeant Mark Kordula and Chief Boren face the wave of underage drinkers pouring into the bars with fake IDs at night. Officer Phylicia Carson pulls over a suspected drunk driver.

programme.title: Sleeping With A Killer (S2) - EP 11
programme.desc: When the 1983 murder of a woman goes cold for nearly forty years, breakthroughs in DNA technology finally expose the man responsible only to reveal a chilling final twist before justice can be served.

programme.title: First Blood (S1) - EP 5
programme.desc: African-American women in the Mt Pleasant neighbourhood of Cleveland were vanishing. Their families cried for help, but no one knew what was happening. No one except Anthony Sowell.

programme.title: Taking The Stand (S3) - EP 6
programme.desc: An American Dream becomes a tragedy when San Antonio businesswoman Andreen McDonald goes missing. Four years later, her husband, Air Force Major Andre McDonald, is on trial for her murder.

programme.title: Murder In The 21st - EP 10
programme.desc: A vibrant, social media savvy, 15-year-old girl goes missing in a small town, leaving the community perplexed to what happened.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Dead West - EP 3
programme.desc: When beloved matriarch Sherry Black, 64, is murdered in her rare books store in Salt Lake City, investigators suspect theft as the motive.

programme.title: City Confidential (S9) - EP 3
programme.desc: A popular lifeguard is found dead at the community swimming pool, causing a wave of terror to flood through Leawood, Kansas.

programme.title: KL Enforcers (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: Follow the Malaysian Maritime Enforcement Agency and the Royal Malaysian Police as they carry out their work, from routine inspection to ambushing smugglers to rescuing the victims of human trafficking.

programme.title: KL Enforcers (S1) - EP 2
programme.desc: See how the Malaysian Maritime Enforcement battle the smugglers who try to escape an ambush. Meanwhile, the police receive a tip-off that leads to the rescue of 34 victims from human-traffickers.

programme.desc: First-timers and frequent flyers get booked, including the son of a deputy who is charged with stealing a dog, and an intoxicated gentleman comes back to see his favourite policeman.

programme.title: Interrogation Cam - EP 5
programme.desc: A suspect is interrogated about a shocking and elaborate hoax; an NFL Hall of Famer breaks the law and pays the price; a murder suspect reveals the truth about the disappearance of his one-time girlfriend.

programme.title: Interrogation Cam - EP 6
programme.desc: A teen couple must answer for a father's murder; a wife tries to explain why she was caught arranging to have her husband killed; the truth about the shocking death of a pregnant woman comes to light.

programme.title: Tell Me How I Died - EP 5
programme.desc: During a welfare check, authorities discover a man has been living with the mummified bodies of his family. Pathologists cannot determine if they died naturally or if something nefarious occurred.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Murder In The Bayou - EP 4
programme.desc: When a young mother, Selonia Reed, 26, is found brutally murdered in her car, detectives turn over every rock in small-town Hammond, Louisiana, in search of her killer.

programme.desc: An argument between former NFL player Travis Rudolph and his ex-girlfriend escalates into a gunfight with her brother and his friends.
